description.value:
The Dragon is the most enigmatic and secretive of the Great Clans. For a thousand years, Dragons have lived in virtual seclusion in the high mountains. They are best known for two things: the mysterious Ise Zumi order of tattooed monks, and the unusual fighting style of the Mirumoto school, which teaches the use of the katana in one hand and the wakizashi in the other. The Ise Zumi in particular, but all Dragons at times, are known for protracted silence, evading direct questions, and speaking in riddles.

Source: Mechanics/Character_Options/Occupations/Community Compendium/Samurai Clans/Dragon Clan.md

Category: Community Compendium

Folder: Samurai Clans

Prerequisite: Age 8+

Class Skills: Select 3 from Chakra Control, Climb, Diplomacy, Iaijutsu Focus, Intimidate, Jump, Knowledge (Tactics), Listen, Sense Motive, Swim.

Feat: Select one from Exotic Weapon Proficiency (katana), Unarmed Combatant (Choke Hold), Unarmed Combatant (Defensive Throw, Deflect Arrows, Grappling Block, Great Throw, Stunning Fist), [Universal: Risky Strike] (Cleave), Weapon Focus (katana).

Wealth Bonus Increase: +1

Reputation Bonus Increase: +1

Affiliation: If a Dragon Clan member takes levels in Samurai his skills listed above become part of his Class Skills for Samurai levels. His Fortitude save becomes Average, while his Will save becomes Good. All feats listed above become feats he may select from the Bonus Feats granted by the Samurai class. While wielding both a katana and wakizashi in their hands a Dragon Samurai suffers no penalties to his attack bonus if he has Two Weapon Fighting and both weapons are properly sized for a normal creature of his size.

featOptions: Unarmed Combatant (Defensive Throw, Deflect Arrows, Grappling Block, Great Throw, Stunning Fist)
